heading: Superintendence of Navy hospitals
label: 15 Superintendence of Navy hospitals
text: The Secretary of the Navy shall have the general charge and superintendence of Navy hospitals.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 4807 derived from acts , ; , .Feb. 26, 1811, ch. 26, § 12 Stat. 650July 10, 1832, ch. 194, § 54 Stat. 573
